name: Ivan Timoshenko
about: I've got 8+ years of experience in Frontend Development, two of which I was a Fullstack Developer.
I have worked in different subject areas such as medicine, government, construction technology and even betting.
I've built 20+ SPAs using React and most of them were from scratch.
Also I've built several REST services from scratch using NodeJS.
I'm currently working with the React and NodeJS ecosystems.
I have strong skills like JS, HTML, CSS, Typescript and React in Frontend part.
And I have medium skills like NodeJS, SQL, Postgres, MongoDB, Express, NestJS and TypeORM in Backend part.
So, I can build a complete application from scratch and dockerize it.
Also, I have 3+ years of management experience.
I managed several teams and was even a Head of a Frontend Department.

company.name: SoftPro
company.description: — is a software provider for betting shops working with VIP clients.

achievements: Implemented some features for the big launch of new project.

company.name: BuildBuild Lab
company.description: — is a developer of software products in the field of construction technologies.

achievements: Implemented Financial module for the system from scratch in a short time, which allowed the product to be launched on time and enter the market.
Interviewed 20+ developers and hired 2 of them, which allowed us to expand the frontend team and take on more tasks.

company.name: PIK.PRO
company.description: — is the largest Russian development company that has built more than 21 million ㎡ of housing.

activities.name: Purchasing module for the system
achievements: Implemented Purchasing module for the system from scratch, which made it possible to control the purchase process and reduce costs for the company.

activities.name: Storekeeper app
achievements: Migrated the application from REST to GraphQL. This helped to reduce the number of requests from 20 to 2 and speed up data loading, which is a critical indicator for construction projects. And as a bonus, the migration allowed us to gain more control over the requested data and reduce the interaction time with backenders by 30%.
Completely covered all features with Cypress which allowed improve the quality.

activities.name: Another activites
achievements: Interviewed 20+ developers and hired 2 of them, which allowed us to expand the frontend team and take on more tasks.
Implemented e2e testing on Cypress, which made it possible to improve the quality of released features and watch for broken features.

company.name: Axbit IT
company.description: — is a software development company that provides a wide range of services from web and mobile application development to complex enterprise automation.

achievements: Became a Head of Frontend Department with 12 developers and formed 4 Frontend teams, which made it easier to manage developers.
New development processes were introduced in the department, which made it easier to manage developers and implement projects more efficiently.
Passed 10+ interviews to confirm the company's expertise and get new customers.
Interviewed 10+ developers and hired 5 of them, which allowed us to expand the department and take on more projects.
Implemented 9 projects from scratch with me as Lead Frontend Developer.
Implemented 2 out staff projects from scratch with me as Senior Frontend Developer.

company.name: Yandex
company.description: — is one of the largest technology companies in Russia, developing a popular search engine in the country and creating services for millions of people.

activities.name: Search. Pictures
achievements: Implemented several features related to image search for the big launch of "Alice voice assistant" product.
Implemented several features that affect the increase in service revenue through advertising.

activities.name: Draft legal documentation
achievements: Implemented a mechanism for dynamic generation of forms based on metadata received from the server, which made it possible to remove the frontend development stage and reduce the time for adding a new document by 2 hours.

activities.name: Another activites
achievements: Became a Lead Frontend Developer and assembled my team of 5 people.
Implemented the first version of the company's website, which allowed the company to become more visible and attract additional orders.
Implemented several scripts and configs for building and deploying the project, which made it possible to quickly start developing projects.
Implemented 5 projects from scratch with me as Lead Frontend Developer.

activities.name: Telemedicine consultations
achievements: Implemented more than 50% of the data access layer.

The OAuth module (OAuth client and OAuth server) was implemented, which allowed users (doctors) to move from one system instance to another without registration, thereby reducing the registration time from 25 minutes to 2 minutes.
Implemented a video conferencing module, which accelerated the receipt of consultations by 2 times.

activities.name: Another activites
achievements: Implemented 4 projects from scratch with me as Fullstack Developer.
